text:
Generally, one visit may be covered each time an HHA employee, or someone providing 
home health services under arrangements with the HHA, enters the patient's home and 
provides a covered service to a patient who meets the criteria in §30. 

If the HHA furnishes services in an outpatient facility under arrangements with the 
facility, one visit may be covered for each type of service provided. 

If two individuals are needed to provide a service, two visits may be covered. If two
